@tailwind base; @tailwind components; @tailwind utilities; /* ─── Custom Fonts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap'); /* ─── Base ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ @layer base { *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; } html { color-scheme: dark; scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { @apply bg-void-1 text-white; font-family: 'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; overflow: hidden; /* App is full-screen, no body scroll */ } /* Selection color */ ::selection { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.35); color: white; } /* Custom scrollbar */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; height: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4); border-radius: 2px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7); } * { scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: rgba(139,92,246,0.4) transparent; } } /* ─── Components ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ @layer components { /* ── Grid background overlay ─────────────────────────── */ .bg-grid { background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(139,92,246,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(139,92,246,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; } /* ── Glassmorphism panels ─────────────────────────────── */ .glass-panel { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.035); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .glass-panel-hover { @apply glass-panel transition-all duration-300; } .glass-panel-hover:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.055); border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.25); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 30px rgba(139,92,246,0.1), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1); transform: translateY(-1px); } /* ── Neon text ───────────────────────────────────────── */ .text-neon-purple { color: #a78bfa; text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(139,92,246,0.8), 0 0 40px rgba(139,92,246,0.4); } .text-neon-cyan { color: #22d3ee; text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(6,182,212,0.8), 0 0 40px rgba(6,182,212,0.4); } /* ── Neon borders ───────────────────────────────────── */ .border-neon-purple { border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(139,92,246,0.3), inset 0 0 10px rgba(139,92,246,0.05); } .border-neon-cyan { border-color: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(6,182,212,0.3), inset 0 0 10px rgba(6,182,212,0.05); } /* ── Sidebar active item ────────────────────────────── */ .sidebar-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139,92,246,0.2) 0%, rgba(6,182,212,0.1) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(139,92,246,0.2), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } /* ── Glow orb decorations ───────────────────────────── */ .glow-orb-purple { position: absolute; width: 300px; height: 300px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(139,92,246,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; filter: blur(40px); } .glow-orb-cyan { position: absolute; width: 200px; height: 200px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(6,182,212,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; filter: blur(30px); } /* ── Status dot ─────────────────────────────────────── */ .status-dot { @apply w-2 h-2 rounded-full; } .status-dot-online { background: #10b981; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(16,185,129,0.8), 0 0 16px rgba(16,185,129,0.4); animation: glow-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } .status-dot-error { background: #ef4444; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(239,68,68,0.8); } .status-dot-warning { background: #f59e0b; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(245,158,11,0.8); } /* ── Font helpers ───────────────────────────────────── */ .font-display { font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace; } .font-data { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } /* ── Animated gradient text ─────────────────────────── */ .gradient-text { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6 0%, #06b6d4 50%, #a78bfa 100%); background-size: 200% auto; -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; animation: shimmer 3s linear infinite; } /* ── Progress ring base ─────────────────────────────── */ .progress-ring-track { stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); fill: none; } .progress-ring-bar { fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; transform-origin: center; transform: rotate(-90deg); transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } /* ── Input base ─────────────────────────────────────── */ .input-base { @apply w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-white placeholder-white/20 outline-none transition-all duration-200; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .input-base:focus { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-color: rgba(139,92,246,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(139,92,246,0.1), 0 0 20px rgba(139,92,246,0.1); } /* ── Button base ────────────────────────────────────── */ .btn-neon { @apply relative overflow-hidden font-display font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase text-xs px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139,92,246,0.2) 0%, rgba(6,182,212,0.15) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.4); color: #a78bfa; } .btn-neon:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139,92,246,0.35) 0%, rgba(6,182,212,0.25) 100%); border-color: rgba(139,92,246,0.7); box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(139,92,246,0.3), 0 0 60px rgba(139,92,246,0.1); color: #c4b5fd; transform: translateY(-1px); } .btn-neon:active { transform: translateY(0); } } /* ─── Utilities ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ @layer utilities { .scrollbar-none { scrollbar-width: none; } .scrollbar-none::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } /* Scan line effect overlay */ .scanlines::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: repeating-linear-gradient( 0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 4px ); pointer-events: none; z-index: 10; } /* Noise texture overlay */ .noise::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); background-repeat: repeat; background-size: 128px 128px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; opacity: 0.4; } }
